attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
WCR.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
WCR.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME,
WCR.SRC_DELETED_FLG,
WCR.EDW_CREATE_DTM,
WCR.EDW_CREATE_USER,
WCR.EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
WCR.EDW_UPDATE_USER,  
'I' AS ACTION_CODE ,
(CASE WHEN NPTCL.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD IS NULL AND NPTCL.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME IS NULL THEN 'I'  ELSE 'U' END)AS DML_TYPE 
FROM
(
                                SELECT
                                NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE AS BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD  , /*Modified the Logic to pull the column : BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE*/
                                NCP.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME AS BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME, 
                                'N' AS SRC_DELETED_FLG,
                                CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
                                USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
                                CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
                                USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
                                FROM $$STGDB.ST_CO_REPORT SCR
                                INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_COO_COUNTRY_CD WCC
                                ON COALESCE(SCR.PROJECTID,'-999') = COALESCE(WCC.PROJECTID,'-999')
                                INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PROJECT NCP
                                ON (COALESCE(SCR.PROJECTID,'-999') = NCP.SK_PROJECT_ID_INT
                                AND NCP.COO_PRJCT_RULE_CD IN ('D','H')) 
                                INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
                                ON COALESCE(WCC.COO,'UN') = NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
                                UNION ALL
                                SELECT
                                NIP.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE AS BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, /*Modified the Logic to pull the column : BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE*/
                                NCP1.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME AS BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME, 
                                'N' AS SRC_DELETED_FLG,
                                CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
                                USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
                                CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
                                USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
                                FROM $$STGDB.ST_CO_REPORT SCR1
                                INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_COO_PROBABLECO WCP /*New join added for the Modified the Logic to pull the column :BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE */
                                ON COALESCE(SCR1.PROJECTID,'-999') = COALESCE(WCP.PROJECTID,'-999')
                                INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PROJECT NCP1
                                ON (COALESCE(SCR1.PROJECTID,'-999') = NCP1.SK_PROJECT_ID_INT
                                AND NCP1.COO_PRJCT_RULE_CD NOT IN ('D','H')) 
                                INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIP
                                ON COALESCE(WCP.PROBABLECO,'UN') = NIP.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
) WCR
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PRJCT_TO_COO_LK NPTCL
ON WCR.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD  = NPTCL.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CD
AND WCR.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME = NPTCL.BK_COO_PRJCT_NAME

SELECT	
BATCH_ID,
PROJECTID,
PROJECTNAME,
PRODUCTFAMILY,
PIDNAME,
BOARDBUILDORG,
FATORG,
DFORG,
RULE,
ANSCOMMASAPARATED,
PROJECTASSIGNEDTO,
CREATEDBY,
PROJECTLASTUPDATEDBY,
LASTUPDATEDDATE,
NOTES,
SNPREFIX,
COO,
RULEASSGNTYPE,
PROBABLECO,
VALIDTAACOUNTRYFLAG,
VALIDTAACOUNTRY,
PROCESS,
RECORDTYPE,
RULEW,
RULETYPE,
PROJECTSTATUS,
REASONFORINACTIVATION,
MANUALPIDINFO,
DTREVISIONID,
OBSOLETEPIDCOUNT,
PIDSTATUS,
INACTIVELOCS,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CO_REPORT ST 
WHERE	NOT EXISTS (
				SELECT 1 FROM (SELECT 
								SCR.PROJECTID 
								FROM $$STGDB.ST_CO_REPORT SCR
						       INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_COO_COUNTRY_CD WCC
                                ON COALESCE(SCR.PROJECTID,'-999') = COALESCE(WCC.PROJECTID,'-999')
                                INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PROJECT NCP
                                ON (COALESCE(SCR.PROJECTID,'-999') = NCP.SK_PROJECT_ID_INT
                                AND NCP.COO_PRJCT_RULE_CD IN ('D','H')) 
                                INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC 
                                ON COALESCE(WCC.COO,'UN') = NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
								UNION ALL
                                SELECT
                                SCR1.PROJECTID
                                FROM $$STGDB.ST_CO_REPORT SCR1
                                INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_COO_PROBABLECO WCP /*New join added for the Modified the Logic to pull the column :BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE */
                                ON COALESCE(SCR1.PROJECTID,'-999') = COALESCE(WCP.PROJECTID,'-999')
                                INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_COO_PROJECT NCP1
                                ON (COALESCE(SCR1.PROJECTID,'-999') = NCP1.SK_PROJECT_ID_INT
                                AND NCP1.COO_PRJCT_RULE_CD NOT IN ('D','H')) 
                                INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIP
                                ON COALESCE(WCP.PROBABLECO,'UN') = NIP.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE
								) WCP
				WHERE WCP.PROJECTID = ST.PROJECTID
				)

SELECT
BATCH_ID,
PROJECTID,
PROJECTNAME,
PRODUCTFAMILY,
PIDNAME,
BOARDBUILDORG,
FATORG,
DFORG,
RULE,
ANSCOMMASAPARATED,
PROJECTASSIGNEDTO,
CREATEDBY,
PROJECTLASTUPDATEDBY,
LASTUPDATEDDATE,
NOTES,
SNPREFIX,
COO,
RULEASSGNTYPE,
PROBABLECO,
VALIDTAACOUNTRYFLAG,
VALIDTAACOUNTRY,
PROCESS,
RECORDTYPE,
RULEW,
RULETYPE,
PROJECTSTATUS,
REASONFORINACTIVATION,
MANUALPIDINFO,
DTREVISIONID,
OBSOLETEPIDCOUNT,
PIDSTATUS,
INACTIVELOCS,
CREATE_DATETIME,
ACTION_CODE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CO_REPORT ECR
WHERE ECR.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI' 
AND  NOT EXISTS 
				(
					SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CO_REPORT SCR
					WHERE ECR.PROJECTID = SCR.PROJECTID
				)
